root.speaker: Lutenist Cael
root.text:
Oh, hello! Want to hear one? It's a short one. The kin
sing it while the bread rises.

play.speaker: Lutenist Cael
play.text:
*Cael plucks three notes, then a fourth that hangs in the
air a beat longer than the others. The room feels warmer.*

name.speaker: Lutenist Cael
name.text:
'The Long Loaf.' My grandmother taught it to me. Hers
taught her. Probably nobody wrote it down — that would
be how you'd lose it.

props.message: Songs the kin sing while the bread rises.

A lute on a wooden stand. Strings dark with use, smooth
where fingers find them.

A small concert hall — three rows of benches, hand-carved.
The acoustics are warmer than the size suggests.
